title: rangaeris schliebenii
intro: Rangaeris schliebenii is a species of flowering plant in the Apocynaceae family, commonly known as the Madagascar rangaeris or Schlieben's rangaeris. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits associated with Rangaeris schliebenii include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory infections. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems are typically dried and used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and potential side effects.
